parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_logs (actor_type, actor_id, action, resource_type, resource_id, metadata, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.actor_type.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.actor_id.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.action.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.resource_type.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.resource_id.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.metadata.toJsonString().replace(/\'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, created_at;
